notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Lars Nootbaar singles on a ground ball to shortstop Edwin Arroyo. Lars Nootbaar to 2nd. Lars Nootbaar advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Edwin Arroyo.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Reds challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Bryan Torres reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Sal Stewart, assist to second baseman Spencer Steer. Iván Herrera scores. Alec Burleson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Reds challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Bryan Torres reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Sal Stewart, assist to second baseman Spencer Steer. Iván Herrera scores. Alec Burleson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryan Torres to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. JJ Bleday out at 2nd. Spencer Steer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nathaniel Lowe GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryan Torres to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Sal Stewart out at 2nd. Nathaniel Lowe out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Brady Singer. Alec Burleson scores. Bryan Torres to 3rd. Masyn Winn to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Brock Burke on the pickoff attempt.
